versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   nats-2-12-4                     true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: nats
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: nats-2-12-4
      name: nats
      namespace: nats
      values: |
        nats:
          # Number of NATS server replicas
          replicaCount: 1
    
          # Enable JetStream for persistence
          jetstream:
            enabled: true
            fileStorage:
              enabled: true
              storageDirectory: /data/jetstream
              size: 10Gi

versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: nats
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: nats-1-3-13
      name: nats
      namespace: nats
      values: |
        nats:
          # Number of NATS server replicas
          replicaCount: 1
    
          # Enable JetStream for persistence
          jetstream:
